
```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(spdep)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)

#Map coloured by having a spatial vs non-spatial winning FC method
#Load df_minmax table regarding the LC or LL model from the robust model selection R file!

world <- ne_states(country = "United States of America", returnclass = "sf")
world <- world %>% filter(!(postal %in% c("AK", "HI", "DC")))

names(df_minmax)[1:2] <- c("postal", "winner_model")

spatial_models <- c("STARIMA", "ESTF", "SDPLM_QML", "SDPLM_GMM", "LSDPLM_GMM", "ENSEMBLE_SIMPLE_MEAN", "ENSEMBLE_TRIMMED_MEAN")
nonspatial_models <- c("RWD", "ARIMA", "DPLM", "VAR")

# helper to classify
df_minmax <- df_minmax %>%
  mutate(
    winner_up = toupper(winner_model),
    winner_type = case_when(
      winner_up %in% toupper(spatial_models)   ~ "spatial",
      winner_up %in% toupper(nonspatial_models) ~ "non-spatial",
    )
  )

map_joined <- left_join(world %>% dplyr::select(postal, geometry),
                        df_minmax %>% dplyr::select(postal, winner_model, winner_type),
                        by = c("postal" = "postal"))
map_sf <- st_as_sf(map_joined)
map_sf <- map_sf %>%
  mutate(
    fill_type = case_when(
      winner_type == "spatial" ~ "Spatial",
      winner_type == "non-spatial" ~ "Non-spatial",
      TRUE ~ "No match"
    )
  )

fill_vals <- c("Spatial" = "red", "Non-spatial" = "blue", "No match" = "grey90")

ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = fill_type), color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, na.value = "grey90", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(fill = "Winning method type") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-130, -65), ylim = c(24, 50))
```

```{r}
#Map coloured with each forecasting method having their own colour

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(spdep)   # for poly2nb, nb2listw, nb2mat
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(RColorBrewer)

#Load df_minmax table regarding the LC or LL model from the robust model selection R file!
world <- ne_states(country = "United States of America", returnclass = "sf")
world <- world %>% filter(!(postal %in% c("AK", "HI", "DC")))

names(df_minmax)[1:2] <- c("postal", "winner_model")

df_minmax <- df_minmax %>%
  mutate(
    winner_up = toupper(winner_model),
    canonical_model = case_when(
      grepl("\\bSTARIMA\\b", winner_up) ~ "STARIMA",
      grepl("\\bESTF\\b", winner_up) ~ "ESTF",
      grepl("\\bLSDPLM_QML\\b", winner_up) ~ "LSDPLM_QML",
      grepl("\\bSDPLM_QML\\b", winner_up) ~ "SDPLM_QML",
      grepl("\\bSDPLM_GMM\\b", winner_up) ~ "SDPLM_GMM",
      grepl("\\bLSDPLM_GMM\\b", winner_up) ~ "LSDPLM_GMM",
      grepl("ENSEMBLE.*SIMPLE", winner_up) | grepl("ENSEMBLE_SIMPLE_MEAN", winner_up) ~ "Ensemble Simple Mean",
      grepl("ENSEMBLE.*TRIM", winner_up) | grepl("ENSEMBLE_TRIMMED_MEAN", winner_up) ~ "Ensemble Trimmed Mean",
      grepl("\\bRWD\\b", winner_up) ~ "RWD",
      grepl("\\bARIMA\\b", winner_up) ~ "ARIMA",
      grepl("\\bDPLM\\b", winner_up) ~ "DPLM",
      grepl("\\bVAR\\b", winner_up) ~ "VAR"
    )
  )

map_joined <- left_join(world %>% dplyr::select(postal, geometry),
                        df_minmax %>% dplyr::select(postal, canonical_model),
                        by = c("postal" = "postal"))

map_sf <- st_as_sf(map_joined)

fill_vals <- c(
  "RWD" = "#E41A1C",            
  "ARIMA" = "#377EB8",            
  "VAR" = "#4DAF4A",              
  "SDPLM_QML" = "#984EA3",        
  "SDPLM_GMM" = "#FF7F00",        
  "LSDPLM_GMM" = "#7FFF00",     
  "STARIMA" = "#A65628",          
  "DPLM" = "#00CED1",             
  "ESTF" = "#FF1493",             
  "Ensemble Simple Mean" = "blue",   
  "Ensemble Trimmed Mean" = "lightgreen" 
)

ggplot(map_sf) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = canonical_model), color = "black", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_vals, na.value = "grey90", drop = FALSE) +
  labs(fill = "Winning forecasting method type") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-130, -65), ylim = c(24, 50))

```
